posts.title: This isn’t a “broken” system. It’s a system set up by the people in power to stay in power. It’s working as intended. There are no high ideals left in the justice system. It’s “give my friends everything and punish my enemies as hard as possible”. That’s the point of it. It’s not broken.

twitter.content:
If an 18-year-old bartender overserves a customer who then crashes their car, they face years in prison.

If a judge or DA releases a repeat violent criminal who then rapes, robs, or murders, they face zero consequences.

The system is broken.
